segments.text: I'm restless, obsessed with your future
And all my worries, they don't bother you
Right now, I spend it on things that I'm half drunk
I'm searching for something not substance
Casually dropping a line designed to keep you next to me
I can't awkwardly craft an advance
I know she wouldn't fall for that
You say, "Shut up and take my hand"
The city comes alive when we're together
Just do it for the memories
Hot damn, look at me now, I'm all caught up
Riding the high of my good luck
I'm casually dropping a line designed to keep you next to me
And I bet you never thought she would fall again
So much for keeping this just friends
Shut up and kiss me now
The city comes alive when we're together
Just do it for the memories
I'm restless, obsessed with your future
And all my worries, they don't bother you
Collected and you render me hopeless
The city comes alive when we're together
Just do it for the memories

transcription.text:
Mayday situation overload
 I'm restless, obsessed with your future
 And all my worries, they don't bother you
 Collected, you render me useless
 But I carry on

 Right now, I spend it on things that I'm half drunk
 I'm searching for something not substance
 Casually dropping a line designed to keep you next to me
 I can't awkwardly craft an advance
 I know she wouldn't fall for that
 You say, "Shut up and take my hand"
 And we carry on

 I don't wanna say goodnight
 The city comes alive when we're together
 Why can't Thursday last forever?
 I don't wanna say goodnight
 I've never been so sure
 Just do it for the memories
 Do it for Baltimore
 And do it for May

 Hot damn, look at me now, I'm all caught up
 Riding the high of my good luck

 And I bet you never thought she would fall again
 So much for keeping this just friends

 Do it for Baltimore
